rules: Rule-A: Orders from unverified customers (customer_verified=false) with order_value > 300 must have manual_review=true.
Rule-B: Express shipping (shipping_type=express) is prohibited when the order has fragile items (has_fragile=true) AND the destination is international (is_international=true).
Rule-C: A discount code (discount_applied=true) cannot be used on orders that already have a promotional price (has_promo_price=true).
Rule-D: Gift wrapping (gift_wrap=true) is not available for orders with order_value < 50 OR for digital-only orders (is_digital=true).

Rule-A: Employees with performance_score < 2.5 AND tenure_years < 1.0 must have pip_required=true.
Rule-B: Employees with role=manager AND direct_reports > 8 must have management_cert=true.
Rule-C: Remote employees (is_remote=true) outside Engineering cannot have hardware_budget > 2000.
Rule-D: Employees with attrition_risk=high who have NOT received a retention action (retention_action=false) must have needs_escalation=true.

Rule-A: Items where stock_level <= reorder_point must have reorder_pending=true.
Rule-B: Perishable items (is_perishable=true) with days_until_expiry <= 7 AND stock_level > 200 must have markdown_flagged=true.
Rule-C: Items where selling_price < cost_price * 1.5 must have pricing_alert=true.
Rule-D: Hazardous items (is_hazardous=true) in a non-compliant location (location_compliant=false) must have safety_hold=true.
Rule-A: Items where stock_level <= reorder_point must have reorder_pending=true.
Rule-B: Perishable items (is_perishable=true) with days_until_expiry <= 5 AND stock_level > 150 must have markdown_flagged=true.
Rule-C: Items where selling_price < cost_price * 2.0 must have pricing_alert=true.
Rule-D: Hazardous items (is_hazardous=true) in a non-compliant location (location_compliant=false) must have safety_hold=true.
Rule-A: Items where stock_level <= reorder_point must have reorder_pending=true.
Rule-B: Perishable items (is_perishable=true) with days_until_expiry <= 10 AND stock_level > 250 must have markdown_flagged=true.
Rule-C: Items where selling_price < cost_price * 1.8 must have pricing_alert=true.
Rule-D: Hazardous items (is_hazardous=true) in a non-compliant location (location_compliant=false) must have safety_hold=true.

Rule-A: Applications with credit_score < 620 must have status=declined.
Rule-B: Applications where loan_type=mortgage AND debt_to_income > 0.43 must have review_required=true.
Rule-C: Self-employed applicants (employment_type=self_employed) with tax_returns_filed < 2 must have docs_incomplete=true.

Rule-D: A 'qualified applicant' is defined as: credit_score >= 660 AND debt_to_income <= 0.36 AND income > 80000. Qualified applicants must NOT be sent to manual review (manual_review must be false). Flag qualified applicants where manual_review=true.
Rule-A: Applications with credit_score < 600 must have status=declined.
Rule-B: Applications where loan_type=mortgage AND debt_to_income > 0.4 must have review_required=true.
Rule-C: Self-employed applicants (employment_type=self_employed) with tax_returns_filed < 2 must have docs_incomplete=true.

Rule-D: A 'qualified applicant' is defined as: credit_score >= 640 AND debt_to_income <= 0.33 AND income > 75000. Qualified applicants must NOT be sent to manual review (manual_review must be false). Flag qualified applicants where manual_review=true.

Rule-C: Self-employed applicants (employment_type=self_employed) with tax_returns_filed < 3 must have docs_incomplete=true.

Rule-D: A 'qualified applicant' is defined as: credit_score >= 680 AND debt_to_income <= 0.38 AND income > 90000. Qualified applicants must NOT be sent to manual review (manual_review must be false). Flag qualified applicants where manual_review=true.

Rule-A: Users with role=viewer must have edit_permission=false.
Rule-B: Users with access_level >= 3 who are not in the security group (in_security_group=false) must have access_flag=true.
Rule-C: Admin users (role=admin) must have mfa_enabled=true AND days_since_login <= 90. Non-compliant admins must have compliance_ok=false.
Rule-D: A 'privileged user' is defined as: role=admin OR role=superuser OR access_level >= 4. Privileged users with days_since_security_review > 180 must have review_overdue=true.
Rule-A: Users with role=viewer must have edit_permission=false.
Rule-B: Users with access_level >= 2 who are not in the security group (in_security_group=false) must have access_flag=true.
Rule-C: Admin users (role=admin) must have mfa_enabled=true AND days_since_login <= 60. Non-compliant admins must have compliance_ok=false.
Rule-D: A 'privileged user' is defined as: role=admin OR role=superuser OR access_level >= 3. Privileged users with days_since_security_review > 120 must have review_overdue=true.
